3148660.name: Super Mascot Star
3148660.description:
This is a casual action game in which you compete with your rivals for the likability of children. Act appropriately as the amusement park mascot and become a superstar for the kids!

FEATURE

Physical Simulation

The movements of the mascot characters are simulated by physical calculations.

Customize

You can select playable character and costume.

Online Features

Online PvP and online cooperative play are supported.

Enjoy the comical movements of the mascot characters simulated by physics.
